phoneticUs: 藞le瑟k藢p蓴藧rt; 藞le瑟k藢po蕣rt
examples: In Lake Village, Arkansas, a grant-aided project to renovate and study Lakeport, the last remaining cotton plantation in the state, has aroused little public interest.
Tracing them is hard work, but Lakeport's researchers believe that this may be the only way to arouse interest in (and attract more money to) their project.
